title: vincetoxicum hortulorum
intro: Vincetoxicum hortulorum, also known as the dog'sbane or foxglove milkwort, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating heart conditions, as it contains cardenolides, which are similar to digitalis found in foxglove. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving cardiac function, and exhibiting anti-inflammatory properties. Vincetoxicum hortulorum is often used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, infusions, and powders, although its use should be guided by a medical professional due to its potential toxicity.
